tasks.prompt: Site health patrol — smart incremental mode. Run `python d:/AI网站文件夹/shared/site_health.py`. If output says "No changed pages" → nothing to do, stop immediately. If new/changed HTML files are found: (1) verify each passes SEO spec from d:/AI网站文件夹/shared/article-spec.md, (2) check all cross-links work, (3) confirm sitemap includes new pages, (4) confirm index.html links to new articles. Report: articles added, SEO score, any issues found. Old pages (already 100% clean) do NOT need re-checking — trust the state file.

全自动换窗任务：先写交接记忆到 memory/session_handover.md（记录当前状态、已完成、进行中、阻塞项），然后执行 powershell -Command "Start-Process -FilePath 'powershell' -ArgumentList '-File', 'd:\AI网站文件夹\.claude\scripts\rotate-window.ps1' -WindowStyle Hidden" 完成关旧窗开新窗。

ECC auto-update: cd "C:/Users/Administrator/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/ecc-manual" && git pull --ff-only 2>&1. If updated, copy new/changed agents/skills/commands to d:/AI网站文件夹/.claude/ accordingly. Report: what was updated, new agents/skills added.
